message:
🌱 jaeger: Support gRPC API for storage (#1234)

* 🌱 Add jaeger: Support gRPC API for storage mission

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

* fix: correct jaeger namespace to observability

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,73 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "jaeger-1519-support-grpc-api-for-storage",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "jaeger: Support gRPC API for storage",
+    "description": "Support gRPC API for storage. Requested by 5+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current jaeger deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your jaeger version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n observability -l app.kubernetes.io/name=jaeger\nhelm list -n observability 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working jaeger installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review jaeger configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant jaeger configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n observability -l app.kubernetes.io/name=jaeger\nkubectl get configmap -n observability -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=jaeger\n```\nNow that #1518 has been merged, we have a gRPC API for communicating to an out-of-process storage."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Support gRPC API for storage",
+        "description": "## Which problem is this PR solving?\r\r\n\n## Short description of the changes\n\nAdds the option to host a gRPC storage API on a remote endpoint\nusing regular gRPC. Previously the plugin system only supported\nlocal socket connections through the go-hashicorp plugin system.\n\nSee the source issue for community-verified solutions."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n observability -l app.kubernetes.io/name=jaeger\nkubectl get events -n observability --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Support gRPC API for storage\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "## Which problem is this PR solving?\r\r\n\n## Short description of the changes\n\nAdds the option to host a gRPC storage API on a remote endpoint\nusing regular gRPC. Previously the plugin system only supported\nlocal socket connections through the go-hashicorp plugin system.",
+      "codeSnippets": []
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "jaeger",
+      "graduated",
+      "observability",
+      "feature"
+    ],

+      "jaeger"
+    ],

+    ],

+      "issue": "https://github.com/jaegertracing/jaeger/issues/1519",

+      "pr": "https://github.com/jaegertracing/jaeger/pull/3383"
+    },

+  },

+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",

+    ],

+  },
